item.title: 摩根大通称霍尔木兹海峡封锁或迫使伊拉克、科威特数日内削减石油产量
item.description: 摩根大通分析师在一份报告中指出，若霍尔木兹海峡持续关闭，伊拉克和科威特的原油供应可能在数日内开始中断，预计到中东冲突爆发第八天，日产量可能减少330万桶。【原文：Crude oil supplies from Iraq and Kuwait could start shutting in within days if the Strait of ​Hormuz remains closed, potentially cutting 3.3 million barrels ‌per day (bpd) by day eight of the Middle East conflict, J.P. Morgan analysts said in a note.】

item.title: 亚洲股市暴跌加剧，市场为能源冲击做准备
item.description: 亚洲股市周三大幅下挫，投资者抛售芯片制造商股票，担忧中东战争将引发石油冲击，推高通胀并延迟降息。【原文：Asian stocks dropped sharply on Wednesday, with investors dumping positions in chipmakers on concern the war in the Middle East will drive an oil shock that raises inflation and delays interest rate cuts.】

item.title: 马来西亚反贪污委员会正调查政府与芯片公司Arm Holdings的交易
item.description: 马来西亚反贪污委员会周三表示，正就马来西亚政府与英国芯片公司Arm Holdings之间一笔11亿林吉特（约合2.79亿美元）的交易展开调查，该交易涉嫌腐败和欺诈。【原文：Malaysia's anti-graft ​agency said on ‌Wednesday that it is investigating ​corruption and ​fraud allegations involving a ⁠1.1 billion ​ringgit ($279 million) deal between ​the Malaysian government and British chip firm ​Arm Holdings .】

item.title: 彭博社报道，雷森公司股东终止对陷入困境的糖业生产商的救援谈判
item.description: 据彭博社周二报道，巴西糖业和乙醇生产商雷森（Raizen）的重组谈判已告破裂，因其共同所有者科桑（Cosan）和壳牌（Shell）未能就融资方案达成一致。该报道援引知情人士消息称。【原文：Talks to rescue Brazilian sugar and ethanol producer Raizen have fallen ​apart after co-owners Cosan and Shell failed to agree ‌to a plan to raise capital, Bloomberg News reported on Tuesday, citing people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 彭博社报道称，黑石集团40亿美元收购新世界集团的谈判因控制权问题陷入僵局
item.description: 据彭博新闻周三报道，知情人士透露，由于郑家不愿放弃对香港房地产开发商新世界发展的控制权，黑石集团与新世界发展的谈判陷入僵局。【原文：Talks between Blackstone and New World Development have stalled as the ​Cheng family resists giving up control of the Hong ‌Kong property developer, Bloomberg News reported on Wednesday, citing people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 阿里巴巴Qwen AI部门负责人辞职
item.description: 阿里巴巴集团Qwen人工智能模型部门负责人林俊阳周三宣布将卸任该职务——此举发生在该公司发布更新产品两天之后。【原文：The head of Alibaba Group's ​Qwen artificial intelligence model division, ‌Lin Junyang, said on Wednesday that he would be stepping down from ​his role - a move ​that comes two days after the ⁠company released updated products.】

item.title: 高盛离任首席法律顾问鲁姆勒将就与爱泼斯坦关系作证
item.description: 高盛即将离任的首席法律顾问凯瑟琳·鲁姆勒将于周二在美国众议院监督委员会作证，其发言人表示，此前她因与已故性犯罪者杰弗里·爱泼斯坦存在关联而辞职。【原文：Goldman Sachs' departing top lawyer, Kathryn Ruemmler, will testify before the U.S. House Oversight ​Committee, her spokesperson said on Tuesday, ‌after having resigned over links to late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.】

item.title: 中国2月制造业活动连续第二个月萎缩
item.description: 官方周三公布的数据显示，中国制造业活动在2月份连续第二个月萎缩，表明工厂主仍在努力盈利，因为疲软的国内需求和投资抵消了出口的韧性。【原文：China's manufacturing activity contracted ‌for a second straight month in February, an official survey showed on Wednesday, suggesting factory owners are still struggling to turn a profit as weak domestic demand and investment offset resilient exports.】

item.title: 油价上涨逾1美元，伊朗危机扰乱中东供应
item.description: 周三油价上涨逾1美元，因美以对伊朗的战争扰乱了中东产油国产量，并导致该地区出口中断。【原文：Oil prices rose more than $1 on Wednesday as the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran disrupted Middle East output and halted exports from the region.】

item.title: 中国制造业活动增速创逾五年新高，私营PMI数据显示
item.description: 周三公布的私营部门调查显示，受强劲需求提振制造业信心推动，中国2月份工厂活动扩张速度创2020年12月以来最快。【原文：China's factory activity in February expanded at the fastest pace since ​December 2020, driven by robust demand that helped lift manufacturers' confidence, a private-sector survey showed on Wednesday.】

item.title: 调查显示，中国2月服务业增速创33个月新高
item.description: 中国服务业活动在2月份以33个月来最快的速度扩张，这得益于需求增强，包括海外订单回升，而成本上升则推动产出价格升至21个月高点。一家私营机构周三公布的调查显示。【原文：China's services activity expanded at its fastest pace in 33 months in February, ‌underpinned by firmer demand including a pickup in overseas orders, while rising costs pushed output prices to their highest in 21 months, a private-sector survey showed on Wednesday.】

item.title: 高盛首席执行官称市场可能需要"几周时间"来消化伊朗战争的影响
item.description: 高盛集团首席执行官大卫·所罗门周三表示，他对金融市场对中东冲突的"温和"反应感到惊讶，投资者可能需要"几周时间"才能更充分地消化其影响。【原文：Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon said on Wednesday that he was surprised at ​the "benign" reaction in financial markets over the conflict in the Middle East, ‌and it may take a "couple of weeks" for investors to more fully digest the impacts.】

item.title: 亚洲股市暴跌，市场为能源冲击做准备
item.description: 亚洲股市周三大幅下挫，投资者纷纷减持黄金和芯片制造商的拥挤头寸，因担忧中东战争扩大可能引发能源冲击，从而推高通胀并推迟降息。【原文：Asian markets skidded on Wednesday, with investors cutting crowded positions in gold and chipmakers on worries a wider Mideast war could deliver an energy shock that raises inflation and delays ​rate cuts.】

item.title: 新加坡星展银行获中国债券承销牌照
item.description: 新加坡资产规模最大的银行星展集团周三表示，其中国子公司已获准在中国银行间债券市场从事非金融企业债券的主承销业务。【原文：DBS Group , Singapore's biggest bank by assets, said on Wednesday its China unit ​has been granted a principal underwriting licence for ‌non-financial corporate bonds in China's interbank bond market.】

item.title: 美元走强，欧元承压，能源价格飙升
item.description: 周三亚洲早盘交易中，美元汇率攀升至三个月高位。随着中东地区冲突持续升级，市场担忧能源价格将持续上涨，投资者纷纷撤离欧元市场。【原文：The dollar rallied to a three-month high in early trading in Asia on Wednesday, with investors retreating from the euro as the growing ​conflict in the Middle East sparked fears of a sustained rise in ‌energy prices.】

item.title: 澳大利亚经济第四季度加速增长，但逆风因素加剧
item.description: 数据显示，澳大利亚去年第四季度经济增速创近三年新高，这一增长势头重新点燃了通胀，迫使央行加息以抑制需求。【原文：Australia's economy grew at the ​fastest annual pace in almost three years in the December quarter, data showed on Wednesday, a pickup that ‌reignited inflation and required a hike in interest rates to tamp demand down.】

item.title: 《金融时报》报道称，特朗普政府正就允许腾讯保留其游戏股权展开辩论
item.description: 《金融时报》周二报道称，在特朗普总统准备于4月在中国会见习近平主席之际，白宫正就是否允许腾讯保留其在主要电子游戏集团的股权展开讨论。【原文：The White House is debating ‌whether to allow Tencent to keep its stakes in major video game groups as U.S. ​President Donald Trump prepares to meet ​Chinese President Xi Jinping in China in ⁠April, the Financial Times reported on ​Tuesday.】

item.title: 洛克希德等军工企业被发现移除Anthropic的人工智能系统，此前特朗普政府已下令禁止使用该技术。
item.description: 政府合同与技术领域的律师表示，尽管特朗普政府对使用Anthropic人工智能工具的禁令可能在法庭上败诉，但洛克希德·马丁等美国国防承包商预计仍将遵照五角大楼的命令，将其珍视的人工智能工具从供应链中清除。【原文：U.S. defense contractors, like Lockheed Martin , are expected to follow the Pentagon's order to purge Anthropic's prized AI tools from their supply chains, government contracting and technology attorneys said, even though the Trump administration's ​ban on their use may fail in court.】

item.title: 英国自动驾驶初创企业Oxa融资1.03亿美元，将扩大港口及机场业务规模
item.description: 英国自动驾驶初创企业Oxa周三宣布，已从投资者处筹集1.03亿美元资金，用于扩大其在港口、机场、仓库及其他工业应用领域的自动驾驶车辆运营规模。【原文：British self-driving startup Oxa has raised $103 million from investors to scale up autonomous vehicle ​operations focused on ports, airports, warehouses and other ‌industrial applications, it said on Wednesday.】

item.title: 投资者与美国原油生产商争相锁定油价飙升
item.description: 本周投资者争相锁定油价飙升带来的收益，导致周一能源期货和期权合约成交量创下纪录——这是以色列和美国轰炸伊朗、德黑兰进行报复后的首个交易日。【原文：Investors rushed to lock in a spike in oil prices ​this week, resulting in a record volume of energy futures and options contracts changing hands on Monday, the first trading day after Israel and ‌the U.S.bombed Iran and Tehran retaliated.】

item.title: CrowdStrike预测2027财年营收将超预期，因网络安全工具需求旺盛
item.description: 周二，CrowdStrike公司预测2027财年营收将超出华尔街预期，押注其人工智能驱动的网络安全解决方案需求将保持强劲。【原文：CrowdStrike forecast fiscal 2027 revenue above Wall Street estimates ‌on Tuesday, betting on resilient demand for its artificial intelligence-powered cybersecurity solutions.】

item.title: Facebook在美国数千用户中出现故障，Downdetector数据显示
item.description: 据Downdetector.com网站显示，Meta Platforms旗下的Facebook平台周二在美国遭遇数千名用户无法访问的情况。【原文：Meta Platforms' Facebook was down for thousands ​of users in ​the U.S. on Tuesday, according ⁠to Downdetector.com.】

item.title: 据《The Information》报道，OpenAI正在开发微软GitHub的替代方案。
item.description: 《The Information》周二援引知情人士消息报道称，OpenAI正在开发一个新的代码仓库，以与微软的GitHub抗衡。【原文：OpenAI ​is developing ‌a new ​code ​repository to ⁠rival ​Microsoft's GitHub, ​The Information reported ​on ​Tuesday, citing ‌a ⁠person with knowledge ​of ​the ⁠project.】

item.title: 美国食品药品监督管理局第二次警告诺和诺德公司存在误导性药品广告
item.description: 美国食品药品监督管理局已要求诺和诺德停止投放其重磅糖尿病药物Ozempic的消费者广告，称该广告对药物功效存在虚假和误导性宣传。【原文：The U.S. ‌Food and Drug Administration has told Novo Nordisk to stop ​running a consumer ad ​for its blockbuster diabetes drug ⁠Ozempic, saying the commercial makes ​false and misleading claims about ​what the drug can do.】

item.title: 交易日 卖雪糕，动荡蔓延
item.description: 中东危机不断加剧引发的股市暴跌于周二蔓延，华尔街最终也未能幸免。能源价格飙升以及其他多数资产市场裂痕扩大，迫使投资者和政策制定者重新审视其前景展望。【原文：The equity rout sparked by the deepening Middle East crisis spread on Tuesday as Wall Street finally buckled, with soaring energy prices and widening cracks in most other asset markets forcing investors and policymakers to rethink their outlook.】

item.title: 投资者为能源冲击和通胀担忧做准备，因伊朗冲突持续
item.description: 投资者正开始为中东冲突可能长期化做好准备，这场冲突可能加剧通胀担忧，威胁经济增长，并削弱未来数月降息的理由。【原文：Investors are starting to brace for a more prolonged Middle East conflict that could stoke fresh inflation fears, threaten economic ​growth and undermine the case for interest-rate cuts in coming months.】

item.title: 迪士尼获得52.5亿美元新短期信贷额度
item.description: 华特迪士尼公司周二宣布，已达成一项新的52.5亿美元信贷协议，该协议将在不到一年内到期，并将取代其先前同等金额的信贷设施。【原文：Walt Disney ​said ‌on Tuesday ​it ​has secured a ⁠new $5.25 ​billion ​credit agreement that ​will ​mature in less ‌than ⁠a year and ​replace ​its ⁠prior ​facility ​of ⁠the same ⁠amount.】

item.title: 莫德纳同意支付最高22.5亿美元以解决新冠疫苗专利纠纷
item.description: 莫德纳公司周二宣布，已同意向罗伊万特科学公司旗下子公司Genevant Sciences以及Arbutus Biopharma支付最高22.5亿美元，以解决围绕其新冠疫苗核心技术展开的长期法律纠纷。【原文：Moderna has ​agreed to pay Genevant Sciences, a ‌subsidiary of Roivant Sciences , and Arbutus Biopharma up to $2.25 billion to settle a ​long-running legal fight over the technology ​that made its COVID-19 vaccine possible, ⁠the companies said on Tuesday.】

item.title: 分析师称特朗普与西班牙的争端或阻碍桑坦德银行收购韦伯斯特银行交易
item.description: 富国银行分析师迈克·梅奥周二在致客户的报告中指出，桑坦德银行以122亿美元收购美国地区性贷款机构韦伯斯特金融公司的交易，可能因特朗普总统暂停与西班牙贸易的决定而受阻。【原文：Santander's $12.2 billion ​acquisition of U.S. regional lender Webster Financial ‌could be stalled by President Donald Trump's decision to suspend trade with Spain, Wells Fargo analyst Mike Mayo said in a ​note to clients on Tuesday.】

item.title: 罗斯百货预计全年销售额将超出预期
item.description: 罗斯百货周二预测其年度销售额将超出华尔街预期，押注在宏观经济不确定性加剧之际，消费者对其折扣服装和配饰的需求仍具韧性。【原文：Ross Stores forecast ​its annual sales ‌above Wall Street estimates ​on Tuesday, ​betting on resilient ⁠demand for ​its discounted ​apparel and accessories amid looming macroeconomic ​uncertainty.】
